error_signature: Return All input hides Limit input
title: Limit input disappears when Return All is dynamic
symptom: When configuring the GMail 'Get Many Messages' node, setting 'Return All' to dynamic causes the 'Limit' input to disappear, preventing further configuration.
applies_when: Trying to set dynamic expressions for inputs
not_this_if: 'Return All' is set to a fixed value
root_cause: This behavior is a known UI quirk in n8n where making one input dynamic causes dependent fields to be hidden, leading to confusion when trying to configure multiple conditional inputs.
fix_steps: Use a ternary expression in the 'Limit' field: {{ $json.output.limit === -1 ? 100000 : $json.output.limit }}
agent_instruction: Set 'Return All' to False and configure 'Limit' with a ternary expression.
